title: Zaslawye Heavy Rain
lead: Zaslawye is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.06. The city is under a high alert with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain is causing significant disruptions in the city. 
 The high humidity of 88% and moderate wind speed of 16.2 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 11.7 GG indicates a high energy demand for heating, while the CDD of 0.0 GG shows no energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Operational teams should be on high alert to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
